finding_results.notes: The verbatim style-bible example line "Mm." (snapshot line 13) was already replaced during the prior revision pass. Full dialogue-register audit confirmed: both characters' contraction levels honored (Hermione high, Draco moderate), no stiff uncontracted forms in casual dialogue, voice separation intact, productive roughness preserved, no style-bible example lines reproduced anywhere in the chapter.
